title: Flymo Contour 500E Electric Grass Trimmer and Edger, 500 W, Cutting Width 25 cm, Orange
features: Telescopic handle which is easy to adjust to the user's height
Simply convert from trim to edge by twisting the cutting head
Plant guard to protect trees and plants and unique wheel for easy edging; trim difficult to access places
Automatic double line feed for easy use and fast trimming
Adjustable steady handle with soft grip for greater control and comfortable use
description: From the manufacturer Flymo Contour 500E Electric Grass Trimmer and Edger, 500W, Cutting Width 25cm Designed for medium sized gardens, the 500W Contour 500E has a cutting width of 25cm, this versatile 4-in-1 trimmer allows you to trim, edge and shrub with ease. The 1.5mm dual auto feed line tackles extra tough conditions. Weighing 3.1kg the Contour 500E is lightweight and easy to use. Telescopic handle Telescopic handle, and secondary adjustable handle are both designed with user ergonomics in mind. Easily switch modes Easily switch between trimming and edging, simply press the button and twist the cutting head to its side-on position and begin. Plant guard Fitted with a plant guard protects plants and shrubs from damage when trimming close to them. Shrubbing This mode allows awkward areas to be tackled easily, like under benches, bushes or trampolines.
